description: Deterministic synthetic case (seed 3001) with 1000 Building objects, 60 flat mixed-type attributes per object, and a single-surface MultiSurface geometry at LoD 2. No semantics, materials, or textures. Targets attribute map allocation, key string interning, and parse/serialize throughput. Hardware load: CPU (JSON key hashing, value type dispatch), RAM (60k attribute key-value pairs). Architecture bottleneck: hash map resize and key interning. Data model bottleneck: flat attribute record size at 60 keys per object.
